moderation.afkWintradeDescription: Players repeatedly flagged for unusually low activity in ranked matches, plus accounts the community marked for AFK behavior or win trading.
moderation.altAccountsDescription: Accounts the community has marked as alternate identities.
moderation.altRelationshipDirectoryDescr: Community-voted account relationships, grouped by the main identity with every linked alternate account.
moderation.noAltRelationships: No Alt Account relationships match this search.
moderation.altDirectoryLoadFailed: Alt Account relationships could not be loaded.
moderation.boostedDescription: Players automatically flagged after appearing in a tracked ranked party with a confirmed cheater.
moderation.confirmClearCheaterTag: Clear this player's Cheater tag and remove its report evidence?
moderation.confirmClearSuspiciousTag: Clear this player's SUS tag and remove its report evidence?
moderation.confirmClearModerationTag: Clear this moderation tag and remove its report evidence?
moderation.hallOfFameDescription: Players the community wants to celebrate.
moderation.noAfkWintrade: No community-marked AFK or win-trading accounts found.
moderation.promptDropper: What evidence confirms repeated match dropping?
moderation.promptAfkWintrade: What evidence confirms AFK behavior or win trading?
moderation.promptAltAccount: What evidence links this alternate account?
moderation.promptHallOfFame: Why does this player belong in the Hall of Fame?
moderation.promptWeirdo: What makes this player a Weirdo?
moderation.altRelationDescription: Search for the related account, then choose which account is the main identity and which is the alternate.
moderation.currentBecomesAlt: {value1} will be recorded as the alternate account.
moderation.currentRemainsMain: {value1} will be recorded as the main account.
moderation.noAltRelationshipVotes: You have no Alt Account relationship votes involving this player.
moderation.altRelationSelectionRequired: Select a related account and choose which account is Main or Alt.
moderation.altRelationLoadFailed: Your relationship votes could not be loaded.
moderation.altRelationSaveFailed: The relationship vote could not be saved.
moderation.altRelationClearFailed: Your relationship vote could not be cleared.
moderation.communityVoteNoReason: This community vote does not require a reason. Each account may vote once per player.
moderation.weirdoDescription: Players the community has marked as delightfully unusual.
moderation.droppersDescription: Accounts the community has marked for intentionally dropping or disrupting matches.
moderation.communityMarkedAfkDescription: Accounts the community marked for repeated AFK behavior or win trading.
moderation.automaticAfkDescription: Players with at least 10 ranked matches showing extremely low activity. Each player appears once; the number on the card is their low-activity match count.
moderation.afkSourceDescription: Each player appears once. Source badges distinguish community marks from automatic full-AFK match evidence.
moderation.noTrackedAfkPlayers: No community-marked or automatically flagged players found.
moderation.automaticAfkDetailDescription: Complete ranked matches where this player was automatically detected below the 70 eCPM full-AFK threshold.
